human_review_note: キャンセルドライブラッシュ / MPMK or 66 は補助リンクとして採用する。SuperCombo total 24(46) の括弧内 total は公式全体46Fと対応する。
supercombo_notes: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties
